content: PostgreSQL in production; SQLite in-memory for tests via api/papadapi/config/test.py. Tests run with DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=papadapi.config.test — no running services needed.

name: UIConfig per-group
description: UIConfig is per-group (OneToOneField → Group), served at /api/v1/uiconfig/. Exhibit builder gated by exhibit_config.enabled in UIConfig.

name: Annotation HLS transcode
description: Annotation media (image/audio/video fields) transcoded to single-variant HLS via ARQ tasks in annotate/tasks.py. Raw file remains as MinIO orphan after HLS success.

content: Annotation types: text, image, audio, video, media_ref. Image/audio/video uploaded to MinIO, transcoded to HLS via ARQ. media_ref links existing archive items. Threaded replies via reply_to FK (currently limited to 1 level in frontend).

Backend CI chain: ruff (E/W/F/I/B/C4/UP/S/T20/RUF/ASYNC/TCH/PT/SIM/DTZ/ERA/PERF/ANN/PGH) + mypy (django-stubs, all 13 apps strict) + import-linter (10 contracts) + bandit + pytest (80% coverage gate). Run: pre-commit run --all-files.

name: Exhibit data model
description: Exhibit: uuid, title, description, group FK, created_by FK, is_public. ExhibitBlock: exhibit FK, order int, block_type (media|annotation), media_uuid, annotation_uuid, caption. Object-level permission via IsExhibitGroupMemberOrReadOnly. Gated by exhibit_config.enabled in UIConfig.

content: Rate limiting: anon 100/hr, user 1000/hr (production). HSTS 1yr + secure cookies + CSRF httponly. No print() (ruff T20). No SQLite. structlog JSON stdout only.
